Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Elysia]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Elysia is known as the City of Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Elysia is a city located beyond a Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Elysia is the tenth Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — The Gate to Elysia can only be opened once a day and while the sun is in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Elysia's walls are made of pale white stone and pure gold with swirling patterns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — The sky in Elysia is a bright, rich shade of gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Elysia has shining walls that stretch at least fifteen paces over a person's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Elysia contains impressive powers and virtues.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Elysia has a gold section.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Elysia is a location with gleaming rooftops and soaring towers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Elysia is not the best Territory for long-distance Traveling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin can wrench a bolt of light from Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Elysia is an item Alin can call upon for power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Elysia is a city of gold and rainbows under a golden sun with silver-and-diamond parapets.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Elysia is the tenth Territory and represents the enlightened virtues of man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — The walls of Elysia can defend against a foreign Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Elysia is a sunny light that Alin feels over his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Alin summons a green shield from Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Elysia is a location where Grandmaster Naraka was taken for healing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Elysia is a Territory that may lack defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin draws power from Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Elysia is a City of Light that contains counters and complements to each other Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Elysia was the guardian of the Incarnations more than three hundred years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin can reach through space into Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Elysia is the complement to each Territory.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Elysia is the only opponent that can stand against Zakareth and Cynara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Elysia is an ancient city built in nine districts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Elysia features an eternal sunrise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Elysia is a location protected by an invisible barrier at its Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Elysia is a place with specific rules regarding the opening of gates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Returning to the City of Light means becoming a part of its fabric and never being able to leave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — There may be Incarnations besides Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The symbol of Elysia is a winged sword point-down in front of a rising sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Elysia is a city with multiple districts and colors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Elysia contains a Violet District.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Elysia contains a Gold District.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Elysia contains a white part which is the smallest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Elysia once fought Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Elysia has noble citizens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — The essence of the Blue Light returns to Elysia when it dissolves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Elysia is warm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — King Zakareth intends to loot the treasures of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Elysia is a location where the group may have to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The King is moving against Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Elysia is the King's real goal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Incarnations' primary objective is to eliminate Alin and Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Elysia has gold-armored, winged warriors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — A battle occurred in Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Elysia is a Territory.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
